name: Pasta Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large saucepan.
2. Add the cream and pepper. Bring to a simmer.
3. Stir in the tomato sauce and precooked vegetables.
4. Cook the pasta al dente, still slightly firm to the bite.
5. Whip the egg yolks with a fork and mix them into the cream.
6. Whisk the mixture into the cream sauce and pasta to thicken it.
7. Ensure the pasta is completely coated with the sauce.
8. Serve with Parmesan cheese.
